narrative:
Tully Twp. township has 572 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
